arm-wrack.name: Arm Wrack
arm-wrack.description: An arm is dislocated, sprained, or broken; the limb won't respond.
arm-wrack.effect: One arm: drop anything held, suffer off-hand penalties for manual-dexterity rolls. Both arms: chance die on manual-dexterity rolls, -3 to other Physical actions.
arm-wrack.causing: Targeted blow to the arm (-2 penalty) that deals more damage than the target's Stamina. A targeted hand blow inflicts on any damage.
arm-wrack.ending: Mark an X under the leftmost Health box affected by the attack. Ends when that damage heals. Aggravated damage = permanent loss of limb.

beaten-down.name: Beaten Down
beaten-down.description: The fight has been knocked out of the character.
beaten-down.effect: Cannot take violent action in combat without spending a Willpower point each turn. May still run, Dodge, and apply Defense.
beaten-down.causing: Bashing damage in excess of Stamina, or any lethal damage.
beaten-down.ending: Character surrenders and gives the aggressor what they want. Regain 1 Willpower and take a Beat, but take no further fight action.

blinded.name: Blinded
blinded.description: The character's eyes are damaged or removed.
blinded.effect: One eye: -3 to vision-based rolls (including attacks) and half Defense. Both eyes: -5 and lose all Defense.
blinded.causing: Specified attack to the eyes at -5 (single eye normally; exceptional success blinds both). Temporary blinding via sand/dirt: Dex + Athletics -3 vs Defense; one turn.
blinded.ending: If an eye-targeted attack deals damage, mark an X under the leftmost Health box. Ends when that damage heals. Aggravated = permanent loss of that eye.

deafened.name: Deafened
deafened.description: Hearing is impaired -- tinnitus, blood-roar, gunshot deafness.
deafened.effect: One ear: -3 to hearing Perception. Both ears: chance die on hearing Perception, -2 to all combat rolls.
deafened.causing: Loud noise within 10 ft, or a targeted blow to the ear (-4 penalty). Supernatural hearing extends the noise range.
deafened.ending: Noise-induced deafness fades after (10 - Stamina + Resolve) turns. Wound-induced deafness ends when that Health damage heals. Aggravated = permanent.

drugged.name: Drugged
drugged.description: The character's mind is addled by mind-altering substances.
drugged.effect: -2 Speed (and static Defense if used), -3 to all combat rolls including Defense and Perception. Ignores wound penalties.
drugged.causing: Voluntary use, or Dex + Weaponry attack at -1 (improvised weapon) to administer. Targeted body part may require a specified attack.
drugged.ending: Generic narcotic lasts (10 - Stamina + Resolve) hours. Medical intervention halves the time.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.description: Everything shudders and shakes; the ground tears open.
earthquake.effect: -1 to -5 to Dexterity-based pools (and Defense) by severity. 1 to 3 lethal damage per turn (reflexive Stamina + Athletics downgrades to bashing or cancels on exceptional success).
earthquake.causing: Without tremendous supernatural power, all but impossible; large explosives can simulate the effect for seconds.
earthquake.ending: Earthquakes rarely last more than a minute (~20 turns). Waiting it out is usually the only option.

extreme-cold.name: Extreme Cold
extreme-cold.description: Bone-chilling temperatures (below 0 C / 32 F). Can be personal via hypothermia or supernatural cause.
extreme-cold.effect: Bashing damage does not heal (heals at the same rate it would accrue). -1 to all rolls per hour exposed, increasing to -5; further hours after that deal 1 lethal/hour.
extreme-cold.causing: Freezing environment; lake/freezer immersion long enough to develop hypothermia.
extreme-cold.ending: Find warmth (heated shelter, warm clothing). Hypothermia needs medical care.

extreme-heat.name: Extreme Heat
extreme-heat.description: Temperatures above 40 C / 104 F. Can be personal via debilitating fever.
extreme-heat.effect: Bashing damage does not heal. -1 to all rolls per hour exposed, increasing to -5; further hours after that deal 1 lethal/hour.
extreme-heat.causing: Environmental -- desert sun, boiler room, sauna. Forced via restraint near a heat source or stranding.
extreme-heat.ending: Get out of the heat. In a desert, find shade; otherwise escape the source.

flooded.name: Flooded
flooded.description: Brackish water, mud, sewage, or gore impedes movement.
flooded.effect: -2 to all Physical pools per foot of liquid. Over-head requires Dex + Athletics to swim or Sta + Composure to hold breath.
flooded.causing: Heavy rain, snowmelt, broken main; smashing a water heater or breaching a small dam; some supernatural creatures.
flooded.ending: Reach high ground. Long-term: drain the floodwaters.

heavy-rain.name: Heavy Rain
heavy-rain.description: Torrential rain hammers visibility and sound.
heavy-rain.effect: -3 dice to visual and aural Perception. Hour+ of sustained rain risks the Flooded Tilt; often paired with Heavy Winds or Extreme Cold.
heavy-rain.causing: Natural weather patterns, supernatural powers, or fleets of cloud-seeders.
heavy-rain.ending: Get indoors or wait the weather out.

heavy-winds.name: Heavy Winds
heavy-winds.description: Howling winds buffet streets and structures.
heavy-winds.effect: -3 to aural Perception. Wind grade 1-5 (1 ~ tropical storm, 3 ~ hurricane, 5 ~ tornado) applies as a penalty to Physical rolls and deals bashing per turn equal to the grade. Reflexive Dex + Athletics to avoid damage.
heavy-winds.ending: Get out of the wind. Buildings or vehicles offer shelter.

ice.name: Ice
ice.description: The ground is mirror-slick with ice or a similar slippery surface.
ice.effect: Half Speed, -2 to Physical rolls and Defense. Moving at full Speed worsens the penalty to -4. Dramatic failure on a Physical roll = Knocked Down. Drive rolls at -5, half Acceleration.
ice.causing: Icy conditions, industrial lubricant spill, polished floor. Dex + Crafts can spread cleaner or chemicals; Extreme Cold + water also works.
ice.ending: Get off the ice. Heat/fire melts it; salt or grit restores traction.

immobilized.name: Immobilized
immobilized.description: Something holds the character fast -- grapple, straitjacket, coffin, restraint.
immobilized.effect: Cannot apply Defense or take combat actions. If grappled, may spend Willpower for a head-butt that may not free them.
immobilized.causing: Restrain grappling move, duct tape/zip ties, locked into tight space, painful joint locks.
immobilized.ending: Escape a grapple (Break Free only on success), or Strength + Athletics - item Durability (-2 if arms and legs bound, -4 if hogtied). Each attempt deals 1 bashing.

insane.name: Insane
insane.description: Panic attack, sudden imbalance, or full psychotic break.
insane.effect: +1 to combat rolls but act after everyone else; -3 to Social rolls; cannot spend Willpower in combat.
insane.causing: Resolve + Composure to resist gnawing anxiety (fail = gain Tilt). Witnessing horrific events; mind-affecting supernatural powers; deliberate gaslighting/drug swapping.
insane.ending: Normally lasts only the scene. Forcing balance: Resolve + Composure (instant) contested by (10 - Willpower); cannot take other actions or apply Defense that turn.

insensate.name: Insensate
insensate.description: Shut down from extreme fear or pleasure; staring, cringing, lost in waves.
insensate.effect: Cannot take any actions. Can apply Defense. Taking damage from an attack knocks the character free and ends the Tilt.
insensate.causing: Mind-affecting vampire powers, werewolf-induced terror, heroic alcohol or hallucinogens (Dex + Weaponry attack at -1 to administer).
insensate.ending: Ends at scene end, by spending Willpower to act normally for one turn, or by being struck. If drug-induced, the Drugged Tilt replaces it.

knocked-down.name: Knocked Down
knocked-down.description: Driven to the floor by a blow or a leg sweep.
knocked-down.effect: Lose this turn's action (if not yet taken). Prone: can still apply Defense; attacks from the ground are at -2.
knocked-down.causing: Melee +2 or firearm +3 damage modifier; or targeted leg attack at -2 with declared intent (halve damage on success).
knocked-down.ending: Standing up costs an action. A character who hasn't acted yet can roll Dex + Athletics - weapon mod to avoid the Tilt entirely (failure = falls and the Tilt applies).

leg-wrack.name: Leg Wrack
leg-wrack.description: A leg is broken, sprained, or dislocated.
leg-wrack.effect: One leg: half Speed, -2 on movement-based Physical rolls (and Defense). Both legs: Knocked Down, cannot stand; Speed 1 (only if forfeiting other actions); movement Physical rolls become chance dice.
leg-wrack.causing: Targeted blow to the leg (-2) that deals more damage than the target's Stamina.
leg-wrack.ending: Mark an X under the leftmost Health box affected. Ends when that damage heals. Aggravated = permanent loss of limb.

poisoned.name: Poisoned
poisoned.description: Poison burns through the body, fogging the head and twisting the gut.
poisoned.effect: Moderate: 1 bashing per turn of combat. Grave: 1 lethal per turn of combat.
poisoned.causing: Ingestion (swapped drink, carbon monoxide leak), or Dex + Weaponry at -1 to inject. Long-term toxin rules apply outside combat.
poisoned.ending: Short of immediate medical care, only struggle. Each turn: reflexive Stamina + Resolve (-3 if also acting). Success counteracts that turn's damage.

sick.name: Sick
sick.description: A churning illness -- fever, ache, sweats, hot/cold flushes.
sick.effect: Moderate: -1 to all actions in combat, increasing by 1 every two turns to a maximum of -5. Grave: same penalties plus 1 bashing per turn of combat.
sick.causing: Hard to deliberately inflict -- vials of pathogen, supernatural disease powers, or long-term exposure days before the fight.
sick.ending: Penalties fade at 1/turn once the character rests; damage inflicted remains until healed normally.

stunned.name: Stunned
stunned.effect: Loses next action and halves Defense until next able to act.
stunned.causing: Head-targeted attack dealing at least Size in damage (target counts Size as one lower for the check). Weapons with the Stun special double their damage modifier for this check only.
stunned.ending: Normally lasts one turn. May spend a Willpower point reflexively to gather wits early, at -3 to actions taken that turn.
